83 Rivington Street.note: Cargo / 83 Rivington Street event space on Kingsland Viaduct.

93 Feet East.note: Brick Lane frontage of the Truman Brewery. Some listings give E1 6QL (brewery main postcode).

Bangla House.note: Could not pin down a venue called 'Bangla House' - likely a temporary/branded space in the Brick Lane (Banglatown) area. Placeholder uses Truman Brewery postcode.

Bike Shed Moto Co.note: Railway arches by Old Street; official site.

Brick Lane Yard.note: Part of the Old Truman Brewery complex (likely Ely's Yard). No distinct postcode found; uses brewery main address.

Christ Church Spitalfields.note: Confirmed via church site / A Church Near You.

Colours Hoxton.note: Formerly Hoxton Square Bar & Kitchen; official site.

Conference Roundtables at Truman Brewery.note: Press Room is a space within the Old Truman Brewery; uses brewery main address.

Devonshire Square.note: DSQ campus off Bishopsgate; official contact postcode.

H.O.M.E.note: Only documented 'H.O.M.E' is a restaurant in Clerkenwell, not the Shoreditch core. If SXSW means a different pop-up space, this may be wrong.

Hidden Grooves.note: Listening bar inside Virgin Hotel London-Shoreditch.

MOTHER.address: Biscuit Building, 10 Redchurch Street, London E2 7DD
MOTHER.note: Mother London advertising agency HQ (Biscuit Building). Assumed this is the SXSW venue.

Mentoring at The Courthouse.note: Courthouse Hotel Shoreditch (former Old Street Magistrates' Court).

Shoreditch Arts Club.address: The Tea Building, 56 Shoreditch High Street, London E1 6JJ
Shoreditch Arts Club.note: Members' club in the Tea Building (entrance on Redchurch Street side).

Spitalfields.address: 16 Horner Square, Old Spitalfields Market, London E1 6EW

Stink Offices.note: Stink production company registered office. Best guess; unverified as the SXSW space.

The Hoxton.note: The Hoxton, Shoreditch (81-83 Great Eastern Street).

Unlocked.note: Unlocked Shoreditch, 118 Curtain Road; Curtain Road spans several postcodes so this is the best available.
